chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6826 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.30325/2019. 3. For hearing of main case. 21.01.2025 Ms. Rabia Khan, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Asif Malik, advocate for the respondent No.3. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Learned counsel for the respondent submits that assessment has been revised and the petitioner remains at liberty to challenge the same before the statutory hierarchy. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that the amended assessment shall be challenged per the law. In view hereof, this petition appears to have served the purpose and is disposed of accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
